name: silva-md
description: Silva MD — A feature-rich multi-device WhatsApp bot with 1200+ commands, AI agent, auto-status, anti-delete, sudo system, and 19 smart features. Built with Node.js and Baileys.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID. Get it from the pairing page.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Owner WhatsApp number with country code (e.g. 254712345678).

PREFIX.description: Command prefix. Single: '.' | Multiple: '.,!,/,?' | Any symbol: 'any' | No prefix: 'none'.

MODE.description: Bot mode: public (everyone), private (owner only), group (groups only), inbox (DM only), both (public).

BOT_NAME.description: Bot display name shown in menus and greetings.

THEME.description: Bot theme/voice. Options: silva, adam, ayanokoji, edith, friday, genos, gideon, gojo, goku, luffy, naruto, nezuko, parker, secktor, suhail, zerotwo, itachi, batman, thanos.

ALIVE_IMG.description: Image URL shown with the alive/menu command.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for advanced AI responses. Get it from ai.google.dev.

ANTIDELETE_PRIVATE.description: Recover deleted messages in private chats (true/false).

AUTO_STATUS_REACT.description: Auto-react to status updates with emoji (true/false).

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Keep bot always shown as online (true/false).

ANTICALL.description: Auto-reject all incoming WhatsApp calls and notify owner (true/false).

TIMEZONE.description: Timezone for date/time features (e.g. Africa/Nairobi, America/New_York).

AUTO_JOIN_GROUPS.description: Comma-separated group invite codes to auto-join on startup. Leave blank to disable.

PORT.description: HTTP server port for the web dashboard.
